steps.title: Steps to perform antiSMASH analysis for bacteria
steps.instruction: Steps to perform antiSMASH analysis for bacteria: [A] An overview of the bacterial version of antiSMASH shows a data input window where you can either upload the genome sequence in FASTA format or get the genome sequence if it has already been deposited in NCBI (https://antismash.secondarymetabolites.org/ assessed on Feb. 7, 2023, at 16:44:21 h). [B] Analysis output: The user has the option of receiving an email notification for the analysed genome. Alternatively, users can either bookmark job links or copy and save a job link to view it further. In both conditions, data can be viewed for a month as per convenience. [C] The genome of Actinopolyspora mortivallis DSM 44261 (NZ_KB913024.
